alignments.candidate_evidence: 8 years at Google Devices and Services with experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; direct accountability for multi-stakeholder program execution and delivery
alignments.job_requirement: 5+ years of experience accountable for technical project/program delivery within Data and AI domain

alignments.candidate_evidence: 8-year tenure in Strategy and Operations role at Google with commercial and technical accountability; experience leading stakeholder alignment, transformation rollouts, and customer-facing program delivery
alignments.job_requirement: Customer-facing pre-sales, technical architecture, customer success, or consulting role

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led global commercial operations scaling and transformation programs; demonstrated stakeholder management across multiple teams and leadership levels; orchestration of cross-functional resources
alignments.job_requirement: Technical program/project management including account, stakeholder and resource management accountability

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product Operations and transformation experience at Google involves data systems and platform adoption; honesty statement acknowledges limited production engineering background but strong requirements logic and design skills
alignments.job_requirement: Understanding of solution architecture related to distributed data systems

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations leader with program leadership and business transformation experience; skilled in UAT, rollout planning, and stakeholder orchestration across complex organizations
alignments.job_requirement: Experience conducting discovery workshops, creating strategic roadmaps, and managing delivery of complex programmes

alignments.candidate_evidence: 8 years at Google with demonstrated ability to influence across technical and commercial stakeholders; ownership of transformation programs requiring cross-level engagement
alignments.job_requirement: Technical credibility to engage and communicate at all levels within customer organization

gaps.gap: No stated Python, Spark, or Databricks platform experience; JD explicitly requires programming experience in these technologies
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has data systems product experience and learning agility; Python listed as actively learning. Technical ramp-on platform tooling is achievable with onboarding, but immediate technical debate with customers on Spark architecture may require support from specialist SAs

gaps.gap: No explicit consulting brand or classic case-team background; JD implies need for customer workshop facilitation and solution architecture argumentation
gaps.mitigation: Program leadership and strategic roadmap experience transfers; customer discovery/engagement skills are demonstrable. Consulting-style rigor can be developed through mentoring by DSA Manager and PS team

gaps.gap: Product experience is ownership-driven and transformation-focused, not native engineering PM; may lack hands-on technical design documentation or product requirements expertise
gaps.mitigation: Role emphasizes post-sale technical account strategy and orchestration over product build; requires strong requirements translation and design collaboration, which align with candidate's transformation and UAT background

gaps.gap: No explicit quota overachievement track record stated; JD lists 'track record of overachievement against quota, Goals or similar objective targets' as a look-for
gaps.mitigation: Program and transformation delivery at Google likely involved implicit growth/adoption metrics; DSA role is hybrid commercial and technical, and scaling operations experience suggests goal-orientation, but explicit revenue or consumption targets not mentioned in profile

output.level_rationale: JD requires 5+ years accountable technical program/project delivery in Data and AI, with technical account strategy ownership, customer escalation leadership, and cross-functional orchestration across PS, Support, Product, and Engineering. Reports to DSA Manager within Field Engineering. Role ownership scope and customer complexity (strategic accounts, production go-live accountability) are established senior-IC signals consistent with L5.
output.summary: Databricks DSA is an L5 senior IC hybrid commercial-technical role requiring 5+ years of accountable program delivery in Data and AI, customer-facing architecture/success, and stakeholder orchestration. Candidate brings strong 8-year tenure in Strategy and Operations at Google with direct program leadership, transformation execution, and multi-stakeholder accountability. Primary gaps are lack of Python/Spark/Databricks hands-on experience (high severity but achievable through onboarding) and absence of explicit consulting case-team background (medium, transferable through roadmap and workshop experience). Role aligns well with candidate's transformation and program leadership family; seniority is appropriate.
uncertainties: Databricks company stage/structure not detailed in JD; assumed enterprise-scale based on customer base description, but no reporting-line clarity on whether DSA Manager is individual contributor or manager-of-managers
Candidate's explicit quota/consumption/growth metric overachievement not stated; profile describes program and transformation success but not commercial KPI track record
Depth of customer stakeholder escalation experience and executive-level negotiation in prior role not explicitly described; inferred from 'commercial operations scaling' language
